name: The Fortress Gates
subtitle: The first assault on the seat of darkness

scenes.narration: The fortress materializes before them like a wound in the sky — black stone that seems to swallow light, towers that twist in ways that hurt to look at. It is not built. It is grown. Fed. Alive.
Ayaka stands at the front, the four Seal Fragments held in her hands. They pulse with light — answering each other, drawing closer to completion.

dialogue.speaker: Ayaka
dialogue.text: Four pieces broken and reclaimed. One fragment remains — inside that darkness. And one more answer: why.

dialogue.speaker: Hutao
dialogue.text: I have guided the dead across the veil for so long. I can feel the weight of souls trapped in that place. Screaming.

dialogue.speaker: Xiao
dialogue.text: Then we give them peace. We give them freedom. We tear down this monument to fear.

dialogue.speaker: Nilou
dialogue.text: Six of us. One darkness. The math is simple.

pre_dialogue.speaker: narrator
pre_dialogue.text: The fortress gate opens — not in welcome, but in hunger. Shadow-creatures pour forth, guardians of the outer ring.

post_dialogue.speaker: Rydia
post_dialogue.text: Your unity is remarkable. The eidolons sing of it.

post_dialogue.speaker: Lenneth
post_dialogue.text: Six warriors moving as one. This is what the heavens would call worthy.

scenes.narration: In the shadow of the fortress, the four newer members of the group gather. Kain traces his fingers along cracks in the ancient stone.

dialogue.speaker: Kain
dialogue.text: In my kingdom, we had ancient stones like this. They spoke of things that came before. This stone screams.

dialogue.speaker: Leon
dialogue.text: I ruled for two centuries. I built monuments meant to last forever. This place — it is a monument to eternity twisted into nightmare.

dialogue.speaker: Rydia
dialogue.text: The eidolons say this fortress was not always dark. Once, it held light. They remember singing in its halls.

dialogue.speaker: Lenneth
dialogue.text: Then we reclaim it. Not for ourselves — for what was stolen from it.

scenes.narration: As they push deeper, the fortress itself responds. A figure coalesces from shadow — ancient, vast, wearing robes of starlight corrupted to ash.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: Void Warden: Valdris senses your approach. He is... pleased. He did not think you would reach this far.

dialogue.speaker: Ayaka
dialogue.text: Then he has learned nothing about us.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text: Void Warden: Perhaps. Or perhaps he simply enjoys the hunt. He has waited eons. He can wait for you to reach him.

pre_dialogue.speaker: narrator
pre_dialogue.text: The Void Warden solidifies fully — a creature of pure shadow, wielding authority over this realm.

pre_dialogue.speaker: Xiao
pre_dialogue.text: It is not alive. It is purpose given form.

post_dialogue.speaker: narrator
post_dialogue.text: The Void Warden dissolves, its form unraveling like burning paper.

post_dialogue.speaker: Nilou
post_dialogue.text: The gates are breaking. The fortress is... weakening. We can feel it.

post_dialogue.speaker: Ayaka
post_dialogue.text: Then we continue. We are close now. The last darkness awaits.

scenes.narration: As the Void Warden falls, Kain emerges from the shadow, his dragoon armor gleaming with aerial energy. Behind him, the sky itself seems to brighten.

dialogue.speaker: Kain
dialogue.text: The barrier that bound me — it shattered the moment your light broke through. I am free. And I stand with you.

dialogue.speaker: Ayaka
dialogue.text: The Dragoon of Baron. You have come far to find this purpose.

dialogue.speaker: Xiao
dialogue.text: Another soul released from chains. Another voice to sing against the darkness.
